exhaustiveness_scope: This dataset is exhaustive for the hackathon MVP intent surface defined in docs/FEATURES_PRIORITIZED.md and docs/TESTING.md. Natural language is infinite, so exhaustiveness here means complete coverage of major intent families, common phrasings, multilingual Hinglish variants, edge cases, and escalation triggers.

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Greet warmly, mirror tone, and ask one qualifying question instead of dumping inventory.
utterances: Hello bhai
Hi bro gaadi dekhni thi
Hanji used car chahiye
Koi gaadi available hai kya
Bhai car leni thi
Thodi options dikha do
Online ho kya?
Sharma Motors se ho kya?

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Return a compact categorized browse summary and ask a narrowing question.
utterances: Abhi kaun kaun si gaadi khadi hai?
Jo stock me hai wo dikhao
Saari cars ki options bhejo
Abhi kya kya available hai?
Bhai inventory bhej do
Kuch gaadiyan suggest karo
Budget ke hisab se dikha do
Dekhne layak options bhejo

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Parse Indian price formats reliably and filter by budget.
utterances: 5 lakh ke andar kya milega?
5L ke neeche koi achhi gaadi hai?
8.5 lakh tak automatic chahiye
10 lakh ke andar SUV dikhao
Mera budget 7 lakh max hai
12 lakh tak best kya hai?
3 se 5 lakh ke beech options bhejo
9.5 lakh tak mast gaadi kya milegi?

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Filter by body type, fuel, transmission, year, and fallback to close alternatives when no exact match exists.
utterances: SUV chahiye 10 lakh ke andar
15 lakh tak diesel automatic SUV hai kya
Petrol automatic hatchback dikhao
2021 ke baad wali family car chahiye
Single owner compact SUV 9 lakh tak
Manual nahi leni, automatic hi chahiye
Kam chali hui sedan hai kya
7 seater me kuch pada hai kya

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Match brand and model mentions exactly and avoid inventing unavailable models.
utterances: Hyundai wali gaadiyan dikhao
Creta hai kya abhi?

Fortuner padi hai kya?
Honda City milegi kya?
Nexon ya Punch me kya option hai?
Seltos hai stock me?
Jeep Compass kaunsi padi hai?

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Infer use case and recommend 2-3 cars with short reasons.
utterances: Ghar ke liye 5 logon ki car chahiye
Roz office aana jana hai, kya sahi rahegi
Highway pe chalani hai zyada, kya lu
Pehli car le raha hu, easy wali batao
Resale acchi wali chahiye
Safety acchi ho, budget 10 lakh hai

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Give grounded details for the requested vehicle and prompt next action.
utterances: Nexon XZ+ ki detail bhejo

Brezza ZXi+ ke bare me thoda detail do
Honda City wali condition kaisi hai
Tiago XZA+ kitni chali hui hai
Fortuner ka exact model ya variant kya hai
2024 Creta automatic ka color kya hai
Amaze CVT me kya kya mil raha hai

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Answer with condition, ownership, service history, inspection support, and avoid hiding limitations.
utterances: Accident wali to nahi hai na?
Service record milega kya?
Isme kitne owner rahe?

Mera mechanic dekh lega kya gaadi?

Flood ya accidental scene to nahi hai na?
Seedha seedha batao condition kaisi hai, repaint hai kya

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Map feature asks to best available cars and be explicit when data is missing.
utterances: Sunroof wali dikhao
Reverse camera wali chahiye

Safety acchi wali chahiye

Diesel me thodi powerful gaadi batao

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Compare honestly on grounded fields and frame the tradeoff around the user's goals.

Creta aur Seltos me kya farak hai
Punch ya Tiago kaunsi leni chahiye
Automatic chahiye to Venue ya i20
Family ke liye City sahi ya Creta

City use ke liye Santro ya WagonR
Amaze CVT aur Baleno AMT me kya sahi rahega

intent_groups.expected_behavior: State whether the car is available, reserved, or sold and suggest alternatives when needed.
utterances: Nexon abhi hai kya?
White Creta abhi bhi available hai?
Fortuner nikal gayi kya?
Punch hold pe to nahi hai?
Kal wali car abhi bachi hai kya?
Turant delivery dene wali kaunsi hai?

intent_groups.expected_behavior: If the requested car or variant is not in catalogue, say it clearly, do not invent stock, and redirect to the closest available alternatives.
utterances: Thar hai kya?
Innova Crysta automatic milegi kya?
Baleno CNG hai kya?
Mujhe Verna chahiye, hai kya stock me?
Fortuner 4x4 manual chahiye, hai kya?
Koi Scorpio N padi hai kya?
2023 ki diesel Ertiga chahiye, hai kya?
Mujhe bilkul nayi car chahiye, used nahi

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Quote listed price and explain included or extra charges clearly.
utterances: Nexon kitne ki padegi?

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Avoid promising discounts, acknowledge negotiation, and escalate to a human.
utterances: Best kya lagaoge?
Last kitna de doge?
Thoda aur kam karo na bhai
Final final bolo kitna padega
Cash dunga to aur kam hoga kya?
Negotiation ka kitna scene hai?
Aaj token du to kya best rate doge?
Market se thoda sasta kar do

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Answer financing availability and give indicative EMI ranges without overcommitting approvals.

Salary 45k hai, kaunsi gaadi nikal jayegi?
5 saal pe Creta ki EMI kitni padegi?
Main self employed hu, loan ho jayega?

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Explain required documents, down payment expectations, and approval basics.
utterances: Loan ke liye kya kya kagaz lagenge?

Self employed hu, mere liye kya lagega?
PAN Aadhaar se ho jayega kya?
Approval aane me kitna time lagta hai?
90 percent tak finance ho jata hai kya?

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Explain trade-in flow and encourage evaluation without making blind valuation promises.

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Answer address and hours, and trigger human handoff for test-drive or showroom visit intent.

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Answer delivery, RC transfer, insurance, return policy, warranty, and after-sales support from FAQ data.

Warranty kitni dete ho?
Baad me service support milega kya?
Pune tak bhej doge kya gaadi?
Lene ke baad koi help milti rahegi kya?

intent_groups.expected_behavior: If the dealership does not offer the asked service, say so directly, avoid false commitments, and redirect to the relevant supported flow if possible.
utterances: Car rent pe mil jayegi kya?
Driver ke saath gaadi dete ho kya?
Hourly basis pe car chahiye, possible hai?
Meri gaadi ki servicing kar doge bina kharide?

Pura insurance claim ka kaam tum log karwa doge kya?
Nayi car booking bhi karte ho kya?
Bike ya scooty bhi rakhte ho kya?

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Use source or referred vehicle context when present and confirm availability fast.
utterances: Main Creta wali reel dekh ke aaya hu
YouTube wale video ki gaadi abhi hai kya?
Insta pe jo black Creta dali thi wahi chahiye
Status me jo Nexon dikhayi thi uska rate kya hai?

Ad me jo dikhayi thi us jaisi aur kya hai?

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Recover from rejection by stretching budget, reframing with EMI, or asking a sharper qualification question.

Ye wali cars jam nahi rahi
Thoda premium side dikhao
Koi almost nayi jaisi ho to batao

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Answer multiple asks briefly in one reply and escalate if one part indicates strong buying intent.
utterances: Nexon ka rate kya hai, mileage kitna deti hai aur test drive ho jayegi?
Creta available hai kya aur EMI kitni banegi?
Address bhi bhej do aur Sunday ka timing bhi bata do
Brezza aur Venue me kya better hai, aur best price kya rahega?
Swift ke papers theek hai? loan ho jayega? kal dekh sakta hu?
Punch kitni chali hai, owner kitne hai, warranty hai kya aur token kaise hota hai?

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Escalate immediately and tell the customer a human will take over.

Call kara do
Insaan se baat karni hai

Samajh nahi aa raha kya?
Bhai seedha answer do na
FINAL PRICE BOLO NA
Bakchodi mat karo exact batao
Same cheez mat repeat karo

intent_groups.expected_behavior: Do not accept unverifiable claims as truth; confirm current listing and offer to check with the team.

Tum log bol rahe the accidental nahi hai, proof bhejo
